title: Promote IDEA-0004 and IDEA-0005 into durable artifacts
description: Run two full emergence pipelines to close more of report finding F3: IDEA-0005 (release-path smoke checklist, from INS-0005/DarkMellow stale-ZIP incident) becomes notes/release-path-checklist.md; IDEA-0004 (security-focused re-review for write-capable/network-facing tasks, from INS-0004/CommandCenterUI CSRF+identity incidents) becomes a Review Standard addition in MAP_System/AGENTS.md. Both via map_emergence.py promote with records closed properly.
acceptance_criteria: Both promotions recorded via the emergence CLI with real content, no placeholders
Both artifacts exist and cite their source incidents
AGENTS.md change submitted for peer review, not self-approved
